text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
99 
DRG_RLTV_WT 
LABEL: 
DRG Relative Weight 
DESCRIPTION: The relative weight for the DRG on the claim. Each year CMS assigns a relative weight to each DRG. 
These weights indicate the relative costs for treating patients during the prior year. The national 
average charge for each DRG is compared to the overall average. 
SHORT NAME: DRG_RLTV_WT 
LONG NAME: DRG_RLTV_WT 
TYPE: 
NUM
